subcodes.title: Words to the wife of a professor, spoken on 1913-01-19
subcodes.first_line: You must thank God that, although I am a person from the East and you are a revered lady from the West, yet we are gathered in this place with the utmost of spiritual affection.
subcodes.subjects: @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @East and West; communication between East and West, @unity; oneness of humanity, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut], @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @spiritual transformation
